name: @codepad/onscreen-keyboard
description: On-screen code-block keyboard: key/layout data model, rule-set-driven Blocks panel, and word prediction. Ported from the standalone WPF overlay's design, adapted to insert through an editor API instead of synthetic keystrokes.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/keyDefinition.test.js dist/blocks.test.js dist/prediction/predictionEngine.test.js dist/layouts/layouts.test.js
